modes.purpose: read-only scan; report missing or weak quality gates
modes.default_when: first-run setup, periodic audits, after CI failure that should have been caught locally

modes.purpose: install missing hooks adaptively; idempotent; CI changes HARD-GATED
modes.default_when: after audit identifies gaps and user approves the contract

modes.purpose: run all configured hooks end-to-end against current HEAD
modes.default_when: after setup as smoke test; before opening a PR; reproducing CI failures locally

human_approval_required_for: modifying .github/workflows/* (HARD GATE — show diff, ask for approval)
overwriting an existing user-flagged custom hook (devloop:quality-gates user-override)
saving an email-derived GitHub username (must confirm)

boundaries.produces: git-lifecycle hooks (.husky/* or equivalent), commit-msg validator, branch-name validator, optional CI workflow extension
boundaries.does_not_produce: agent-runtime hooks (those live in plugin's hooks/ directory; this skill manages git hooks only)
boundaries.does_not_handle: host-machine tool installation (prints install hints, does not auto-install)
